name: Lanos Logic
description: Strategic AI automation solutions provider. Provides tools to browse AI services, case studies, industries, and submit inquiries.

skills.name: Browse AI Services
skills.description: List and get details on Lanos Logic AI automation services including AI agents, voice AI, document automation, vector databases, and more.

skills.name: Browse Case Studies
skills.description: Search 42 real-world automation case studies filterable by industry, platform, country, and type.

skills.name: Browse Industries
skills.description: Explore 13 industries served including healthcare, legal, government, pharmaceutical, and marketing.

skills.name: Company Information
skills.description: Get team members, contact details, technology stack, and engagement process.

skills.name: Submit Inquiry
skills.description: Submit a contact form to the Lanos Logic sales team. Rate limited to 5/min.
